{{CargoOrgan
|name=Sinister Tattoo
|type=Bionic
|rank=green
|id=10650
|idx=6
|description=Statistics show that tattoos increase the boldness of those with tattoos and their unusual death rate.
|skill=Awaken the power of darkness,
dealing DMG equal to 145% of ATK!
|hp=350
|def=89
|atk=40
|rush=43
|gene1=In explorations, Demon God Cells collected +2.5%
|gene2=In explorations, {race} DEF +20
|gene7=In explorations, Demon God Cells collected +2.5% (Awakened)
|}}
